_comment: Quarter Bin Arcade — enterable, currently flavor. The cabinets are placeholders for the BOPware/SPACED mini-games we can embed here later (brand crossover). 'flavor' cabinets print color text for now.
name: Quarter Bin Arcade

exits.name: SPACED cabinet
exits.flavor: A SPACED cabinet hums in the corner. OUT OF ORDER… for now. (Playable here in a later build.)

exits.name: Poojectile cabinet
exits.flavor: POOJECTILE. The screen flickers an invitation. INSERT QUARTER — soon.

exits.name: Pinball Buddy
exits.flavor: A pinball machine with your face on the backglass. How did they—? (Later.)

exits.name: Mystery cabinet
exits.flavor: An unmarked cabinet. It just says BOP. It's warm to the touch.
